# Read the file and print content and repr to inspect exact characters and indices
path = "/mnt/data/file-MQUdXmA8vFJ5Qh4FFBSSHL-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "rb") as f:
    data = f.read()
data[:1000], len(data)

# Read file as text
path = "/mnt/data/file-MQUdXmA8vFJ5Qh4FFBSSHL-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()

# Print text for inspection
print(text)[:1000]

text = text  # already read
# find markers
markers = []
start_idx = 0
while True:
    s = text.find("(aya_start)", start_idx)
    if s == -1:
        break
    e = text.find("(aya_end)", s)
    if e == -1:
        break
    # compute content between end of marker and start of end marker
    content_start = s + len("(aya_start)")
    content_end = e
    content = text[content_start:content_end]
    markers.append(("aya", s, e, content, content_start, content_end))
    start_idx = e + len("(aya_end)")

# find hadith
start_idx = 0
hadiths = []
while True:
    s = text.find("(hadith_start)", start_idx)
    if s == -1:
        break
    e = text.find("(hadith_end)", s)
    if e == -1:
        break
    content_start = s + len("(hadith_start)")
    content_end = e
    content = text[content_start:content_end]
    hadiths.append(("hadith", s, e, content, content_start, content_end))
    start_idx = e + len("(hadith_end)")

markers, hadiths, len(text)

spans_to_check = [
    ("aya1", "وَلَمَّا بَلَغَ أَشُدَّهُ وَاسْتَوَىٰ أَتْلُجَ الْبَيْتَ حِينَ بَلَغَ أَنِ اعْبُدُوا اللَّهَ رَبِّي وَرَبَّكُمْ ۖ إِنَّنِي خَشِيتُ أَن تَقْتُلُونِ"),
    ("hadith", "أَنْتَ آدَمُ الَّذِي أَغْوَيْتَ النَّاسَ وَأَخْرَجْتَهُمْ مِنَ الْجَنَّةِ"),
    ("aya2", "وَلَا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةٌ وِزْرَ أُخْرَىٰ")
]

for name, stext in spans_to_check:
    occs = []
    start = 0
    while True:
        i = text.find(stext, start)
        if i == -1:
            break
        occs.append((i, i+len(stext)))
        start = i+1
    print(name, "occurrences:", occs)

results = []
# Aya1
aya1 = spans_to_check[0][1]
i1 = text.find(aya1)
j1 = i1 + len(aya1)
print("aya1 found at", i1, j1, text[i1:j1]==aya1)
print(repr(text[i1-10:i1+10]))

# hadith
hadith = spans_to_check[1][1]
ih = text.find(hadith)
jh = ih + len(hadith)
print("hadith found at", ih, jh, text[ih:jh]==hadith)
print(repr(text[ih-10:ih+10]))

# aya2
aya2 = spans_to_check[2][1]
i2 = text.find(aya2)
j2 = i2 + len(aya2)
print("aya2 found at", i2, j2, text[i2:j2]==aya2)
print(repr(text[i2-10:i2+10]))

# Show contexts to check cues within ±64 chars
for name,(start,end) in zip([sp[0] for sp in spans_to_check],[(i1,j1),(ih,jh),(i2,j2)]):
    context = text[max(0,start-70):min(len(text), end+70)]
    print("----", name, "context:\n", context, "\n")
